label: Vintage Curio
description: Vintage-store and collector-shop expression for antique dealers, vinyl record stores, second-hand bookshops, retro-camera resellers and curated estate-sale curators. A faded-parchment background, deep oxblood primary and a brass accent feel like the inside of a leather-bound catalogue from the 1920s. Serif display + tight radii + restrained motion communicate provenance and patina without going kitschy.
